positive: A highly stylized, whimsical scene featuring a cluster of magical forest mushrooms and delicate glowing fireflies nestled among lush tropical foliage. The composition is centered and symmetrical, emphasizing the natural forms and glowing elements. Use a high-contrast, jewel-toned color palette dominated by emerald greens, sapphire blues, and bioluminescent gold accents. The art style should be a blend of elegant Art Nouveau illustration and modern digital line art, giving a clean, decorative, and graphic quality perfect for screen printing. Sharp, crisp lines, deep silhouettes against a subtle gradient background, vector graphic quality, suitable for large-scale apparel printing.
